# smcepi

The goal of smcepi is to provide functions that make data analysis
easier for San Mateo County epidemiologists.

## Installation

You can install the development version of smcepi from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("San-Mateo-County-Health-Epidemiology/smcepi")
```

Broadly speaking, functions in this package fall into these categories:

- data visualization templates that follow the SMC style guide
- helper functions for connecting to Azure from R
- misc file management

# Package index

## Azure

Functions to deal with Azure data from R

- [`azure_connect()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/azure_connect.md)
  : Connect to Azure
- [`azure_import_loop()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/azure_import_loop.md)
  : Write large datasets from R to Azure
- [`varchar_max()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/varchar_max.md)
  : Get character variable (varchar) lengths for import into Azure

## Data viz

Functions to format charts and tables according to the SMC Epi style
guide

- [`theme_ft_smc()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/theme_ft_smc.md)
  :

  Using `theme_ft_smc`

- [`theme_gg_smc()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/theme_gg_smc.md)
  :

  Using `theme_gg_smc`

- [`theme_pl_smc()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/theme_pl_smc.md)
  :

  Using `theme_pl_smc`

- [`load_smc_fonts()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/load_smc_fonts.md)
  : Download SMC Fonts

- [`gg_color_title()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/gg_color_title.md)
  :

  Using
  [`gg_color_title()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/gg_color_title.md)

## Misc data processing

Other helpful functions for data processing

- [`get_file_path()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/get_file_path.md)
  : Get file path for a file stored in a folder with multiple versions
  of a file

- [`read_tsv_cr()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/read_tsv_cr.md)
  :

  Reading large tab separated files with `read_tsv_cr`

- [`smc_city_clean()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/smc_city_clean.md)
  : cleaning up San Mateo Cities in a data frame

- [`smc_zip_region_sort()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/smc_zip_region_sort.md)
  : Classify zip codes by region in San Mateo County

- [`remove_right_empty_cols()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/remove_right_empty_cols.md)
  : Remove all empty columns on the right end of a data set.

- [`life_table()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/life_table.md)
  : life table

- [`make_life_table()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/make_life_table.md)
  : Creating life tables

- [`get_le()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/get_le.md)
  : Pulling Life Expectancy from a Life Table

- [`ci()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/ci.md)
  : Confidence interval for a proportion

- [`prop_sd()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/prop_sd.md)
  : Standard deviation calculation for a proportion

- [`prop_rse()`](https://san-mateo-county-health-epidemiology.github.io/smcepi/reference/prop_rse.md)
  : Relative standard error calculation for sample and survey data
